name: 2D Metroidvania Platformer
agentBrief: A complete Hollow Knight-style 2D metroidvania. PLAYER: scenes/player/player.tscn driven by scripts/player/player_controller.gd (CharacterBody2D: run, jump, double jump, dash, wall slide/jump, stomp-to-kill, melee attack; movement feel is tuned via @export vars — change those, not the physics code). ABILITIES: scripts/autoloads/ability_manager.gd gates dash/wall_climb/double_jump/down_attack/charged_attack behind pickups (scenes/systems/ability_pickup.tscn) and gates (scenes/systems/ability_gate.tscn). WORLD: 7 interconnected rooms in scenes/rooms/room_01-07.tscn managed by RoomManager + SceneTransition autoloads; also 3 linear levels in scenes/levels/. ENEMIES: patrol + flying enemies in scenes/enemies/, boss fight in scenes/bosses/crystal_queen.tscn. SYSTEMS: checkpoints/benches, coins/gems + shop (scenes/ui/shop.tscn), quests via QuestManager + quest_journal UI, saves via SaveManager, game-feel via JuiceManager (screenshake/squash). UI: full menu set in scenes/ui/ (main_menu, hud, pause, map, game_over, victory). INPUT ACTIONS (already bound): move_left, move_right, move_down, jump, dash, attack, interact, pause. AUTOLOADS (9, wired in project.godot): EventBus, AbilityManager, RoomManager, GameManager, QuestManager, SaveManager, SceneTransition, JuiceManager, AudioManager — extend these rather than adding parallel singletons. NOTE: run/main_scene is the main menu; gameplay starts via New Game -> room_01. CUSTOMIZE BY: reskinning sprites in assets/, retuning player @exports, editing room layouts, swapping enemy/boss behavior, retheming UI — do not rewrite the autoload spine.

userFacing.tagline: A complete Hollow Knight-style metroidvania: tight combat, ability gates, bosses, quests.
highlights: Tuned platformer controller with double jump, dash, wall jump and stomp
Boss fight, patrol + flying enemies, melee combat
Quests, shop, checkpoints and a full save system
Complete UI set: menu, HUD, map, pause, game over, victory
